input.content:
# Config Reference

Every skill reads its data from the project config via `nurge config show --format json`. This document lists every config key, what it stores, when it's set, and which skills depend on it.

Config is stored in `.nurge/config.json` as a flat key-value map under the `settings` field.

---

## User Identity

| Key | What It Stores | Set During | Used By |
|---|---|---|---|
| `user.name` | The user's preferred name | Phase 1, step F1 | nurge-review, all skills (personalization) |
| `user.role` | Job title/role (founder, head of sales, SDR, AE) | Phase 1, step F3 | Maturity detection, skill tone |

---

## Company Information

| Key | What It Stores | Set During | Used By |
|---|---|---|---|
| `company.website` | Company website URL | Phase 1, step F2 | nurge-product |
| `company.description` | One-line company description | Phase 1, step F2 | nurge-product, nurge-qualify |
| `company.industry` | Industry/vertical | Phase 1, step F2 | nurge-qualify |

---

## Product

| Key | What It Stores | Set During | Used By |
|---|---|---|---|
| `product.positioning` | Punchy one-liner for cold outreach (under 15 words) | Phase 2, Z7/E7/O6/S7 | nurge-outbound, nurge-followup, nurge-replies, nurge-book, nurge-research |
| `product.social_proof` | JSON array of proof points (logos, testimonials, metrics) or "none" | Phase 2, Z8/E8/O7/S8 | nurge-outbound |

---

## Ideal Customer Profile

| Key | What It Stores | Set During | Used By |
|---|---|---|---|
| `icp.company_size` | Target company size range (employees or revenue) | Phase 2, Z5/E5/O4/S5 | nurge-icp, nurge-research, nurge-qualify, nurge-prospects |
| `icp.industry` | Target industries/verticals | Phase 2, Z5/E5/O4/S5 | nurge-icp, nurge-research, nurge-qualify, nurge-prospects |
| `icp.stage` | Target company stage (startup, growth, enterprise) | Phase 2, Z5/E5/O4/S5 | nurge-icp, nurge-research, nurge-qualify, nurge-prospects |
| `icp.geography` | Target geography | Phase 2, Z5/E5/O4/S5 | nurge-icp, nurge-research, nurge-qualify, nurge-prospects |

---

## Personas

| Key | What It Stores | Set During | Used By |
|---|---|---|---|
| `personas` | JSON array of buyer personas (title, pain points, messaging angle, tone) | Phase 2, Z6/E6/O5/S6 | nurge-personas, nurge-outbound, nurge-sequence, nurge-followup, nurge-replies, nurge-book, nurge-research, nurge-qualify, nurge-prospects, nurge-analytics, nurge-review |

---

## Prospects

| Key | What It Stores | Set During | Used By |
|---|---|---|---|
| `prospects.geography` | Where prospects are located (US, EU, Global, specific regions) | Phase 2, Z4/E10/inferred | nurge-icp, nurge-outbound, nurge-research, nurge-prospects, nurge-hygiene |

---

## Qualification

| Key | What It Stores | Set During | Used By |
|---|---|---|---|
| `qualification.framework` | Qualification method (default: BANT) with criteria | Phase 2, Z9/E9/O9/S10 | nurge-qualify, nurge-replies |

---

## Sending Infrastructure

| Key | What It Stores | Set During | Used By |
|---|---|---|---|
| `sending.domain_type` | "dedicated" or "primary" | Phase 2, Z1/E2/O3 | nurge-sending-health |
| `sending.mailbox_count` | Number of email accounts used for sending | Phase 2, Z1/E2 | nurge-sending-health |
| `sending.warmup_status` | "warmed" or "fresh" | Phase 2, Z1/E2/O3 | nurge-sending-health, nurge-pipeline |
| `sending.deliverability_checked` | Boolean — DNS checks completed | Phase 2, Z2/E3/O3/S4 | Resume logic |

---

## KPIs and Goals

| Key | What It Stores | Set During | Used By |
|---|---|---|---|
| `kpi.goal` | Primary outbound goal (book meetings, build pipeline, generate revenue, validate PMF) | Phase 2, Z10/E12/O10/S11 | nurge-pipeline, nurge-analytics, nurge-review |
| `kpi.daily_emails` | Daily email target | Phase 2, Z10/E12/O10/S11 | nurge-pipeline, nurge-sequence, nurge-sending-health, nurge-analytics, nurge-review |
| `kpi.weekly_meetings` | Weekly meeting target | Phase 2, Z10/E12/O10/S11 | nurge-analytics, nurge-review |
| `kpi.reply_rate_target` | Target reply rate (percentage) | Phase 2, Z10/E12/O10/S11 | nurge-analytics, nurge-review |

---

## Team

| Key | What It Stores | Set During | Used By |
|---|---|---|---|
| `team.size` | Number of people doing outbound | Phase 1, step F3 | Maturity detection |
| `team.structure` | JSON with rep count, territories, mailbox sharing, top performer | Phase 2, S2 (Scaling only) | Scaling-level skills |

---

## Tools

| Key | What It Stores | Set During | Used By |
|---|---|---|---|
| `tools.crm` | CRM name or "none" | Phase 1, step F4 | Maturity detection |
| `tools.crm_checked` | Boolean — CRM connection attempted | Phase 2, E4/O1/S1 | Resume logic |
| `tools.sequences` | Sequence tool name or "none" | Phase 1, step F4 | Gap analysis |
| `tools.enrichment` | Enrichment tool name or "none" | Phase 1, step F4 | Gap analysis |

---

## Email Connection

| Key | What It Stores | Set During | Used By |
|---|---|---|---|
| `email.connected` | Boolean — Gmail connected successfully | Phase 1, step F5 | Maturity detection, all email operations |

---

## Detection

| Key | What It Stores | Set During | Used By |
|---|---|---|---|
| `detection.outbound_count` | Number of outbound emails found during sync | Phase 1, step F6 | Maturity detection |
| `maturity.level` | Detected maturity: zero, experimenting, operating, scaling | Phase 1, step F7 | All skills (quality adjustment), Phase 2 routing |

---

## Analytics State

| Key | What It Stores | Set During | Used By |
|---|---|---|---|
| `analytics.initial_patterns` | Boolean — light pattern analysis completed | Phase 2, E11 (Experimenting) | Resume logic |
| `analytics.full_analysis` | Boolean — full performance analysis completed | Phase 2, O8/S9 (Operating/Scaling) | Resume logic |

toolUseResult.content:
# Config Reference

Every skill reads its data from the project config via `nurge config show --format json`. This document lists every config key, what it stores, when it's set, and which skills depend on it.

Config is stored in `.nurge/config.json` as a flat key-value map under the `settings` field.

---

## User Identity

| Key | What It Stores | Set During | Used By |
|---|---|---|---|
| `user.name` | The user's preferred name | Phase 1, step F1 | nurge-review, all skills (personalization) |
| `user.role` | Job title/role (founder, head of sales, SDR, AE) | Phase 1, step F3 | Maturity detection, skill tone |

---

## Company Information

| Key | What It Stores | Set During | Used By |
|---|---|---|---|
| `company.website` | Company website URL | Phase 1, step F2 | nurge-product |
| `company.description` | One-line company description | Phase 1, step F2 | nurge-product, nurge-qualify |
| `company.industry` | Industry/vertical | Phase 1, step F2 | nurge-qualify |

---

## Product

| Key | What It Stores | Set During | Used By |
|---|---|---|---|
| `product.positioning` | Punchy one-liner for cold outreach (under 15 words) | Phase 2, Z7/E7/O6/S7 | nurge-outbound, nurge-followup, nurge-replies, nurge-book, nurge-research |
| `product.social_proof` | JSON array of proof points (logos, testimonials, metrics) or "none" | Phase 2, Z8/E8/O7/S8 | nurge-outbound |

---

## Ideal Customer Profile

| Key | What It Stores | Set During | Used By |
|---|---|---|---|
| `icp.company_size` | Target company size range (employees or revenue) | Phase 2, Z5/E5/O4/S5 | nurge-icp, nurge-research, nurge-qualify, nurge-prospects |
| `icp.industry` | Target industries/verticals | Phase 2, Z5/E5/O4/S5 | nurge-icp, nurge-research, nurge-qualify, nurge-prospects |
| `icp.stage` | Target company stage (startup, growth, enterprise) | Phase 2, Z5/E5/O4/S5 | nurge-icp, nurge-research, nurge-qualify, nurge-prospects |
| `icp.geography` | Target geography | Phase 2, Z5/E5/O4/S5 | nurge-icp, nurge-research, nurge-qualify, nurge-prospects |

---

## Personas

| Key | What It Stores | Set During | Used By |
|---|---|---|---|
| `personas` | JSON array of buyer personas (title, pain points, messaging angle, tone) | Phase 2, Z6/E6/O5/S6 | nurge-personas, nurge-outbound, nurge-sequence, nurge-followup, nurge-replies, nurge-book, nurge-research, nurge-qualify, nurge-prospects, nurge-analytics, nurge-review |

---

## Prospects

| Key | What It Stores | Set During | Used By |
|---|---|---|---|
| `prospects.geography` | Where prospects are located (US, EU, Global, specific regions) | Phase 2, Z4/E10/inferred | nurge-icp, nurge-outbound, nurge-research, nurge-prospects, nurge-hygiene |

---

## Qualification

| Key | What It Stores | Set During | Used By |
|---|---|---|---|
| `qualification.framework` | Qualification method (default: BANT) with criteria | Phase 2, Z9/E9/O9/S10 | nurge-qualify, nurge-replies |

---

## Sending Infrastructure

| Key | What It Stores | Set During | Used By |
|---|---|---|---|
| `sending.domain_type` | "dedicated" or "primary" | Phase 2, Z1/E2/O3 | nurge-sending-health |
| `sending.mailbox_count` | Number of email accounts used for sending | Phase 2, Z1/E2 | nurge-sending-health |
| `sending.warmup_status` | "warmed" or "fresh" | Phase 2, Z1/E2/O3 | nurge-sending-health, nurge-pipeline |
| `sending.deliverability_checked` | Boolean — DNS checks completed | Phase 2, Z2/E3/O3/S4 | Resume logic |

---

## KPIs and Goals

| Key | What It Stores | Set During | Used By |
|---|---|---|---|
| `kpi.goal` | Primary outbound goal (book meetings, build pipeline, generate revenue, validate PMF) | Phase 2, Z10/E12/O10/S11 | nurge-pipeline, nurge-analytics, nurge-review |
| `kpi.daily_emails` | Daily email target | Phase 2, Z10/E12/O10/S11 | nurge-pipeline, nurge-sequence, nurge-sending-health, nurge-analytics, nurge-review |
| `kpi.weekly_meetings` | Weekly meeting target | Phase 2, Z10/E12/O10/S11 | nurge-analytics, nurge-review |
| `kpi.reply_rate_target` | Target reply rate (percentage) | Phase 2, Z10/E12/O10/S11 | nurge-analytics, nurge-review |

---

## Team

| Key | What It Stores | Set During | Used By |
|---|---|---|---|
| `team.size` | Number of people doing outbound | Phase 1, step F3 | Maturity detection |
| `team.structure` | JSON with rep count, territories, mailbox sharing, top performer | Phase 2, S2 (Scaling only) | Scaling-level skills |

---

## Tools

| Key | What It Stores | Set During | Used By |
|---|---|---|---|
| `tools.crm` | CRM name or "none" | Phase 1, step F4 | Maturity detection |
| `tools.crm_checked` | Boolean — CRM connection attempted | Phase 2, E4/O1/S1 | Resume logic |
| `tools.sequences` | Sequence tool name or "none" | Phase 1, step F4 | Gap analysis |
| `tools.enrichment` | Enrichment tool name or "none" | Phase 1, step F4 | Gap analysis |

---

## Email Connection

| Key | What It Stores | Set During | Used By |
|---|---|---|---|
| `email.connected` | Boolean — Gmail connected successfully | Phase 1, step F5 | Maturity detection, all email operations |

---

## Detection

| Key | What It Stores | Set During | Used By |
|---|---|---|---|
| `detection.outbound_count` | Number of outbound emails found during sync | Phase 1, step F6 | Maturity detection |
| `maturity.level` | Detected maturity: zero, experimenting, operating, scaling | Phase 1, step F7 | All skills (quality adjustment), Phase 2 routing |

---

## Analytics State

| Key | What It Stores | Set During | Used By |
|---|---|---|---|
| `analytics.initial_patterns` | Boolean — light pattern analysis completed | Phase 2, E11 (Experimenting) | Resume logic |
| `analytics.full_analysis` | Boolean — full performance analysis completed | Phase 2, O8/S9 (Operating/Scaling) | Resume logic |
| `analytics.gap_analysis` | Boolean — tool gap analysis completed | Phase 2, E13/O11/S12 | Resume logic |

---

## Setup State

| Key | What It Stores | Set During | Used By |
|---|---|---|---|
| `setup_completed` | Boolean — full setup finished | Phase 2 final step | nurge-setup router (prevents re-running) |

---

## Config by Skill

Which skills read which config keys:

| Skill | Config Dependencies |
|---|---|
| nurge-product | `company.website`, `company.description`, `company.industry`, `product.positioning`, `product.social_proof` |
| nurge-icp | `icp.company_size`, `icp.industry`, `icp.stage`, `icp.geography`, `prospects.geography` |
| nurge-personas | `personas` |
| nurge-research | `icp.*`, `personas`, `product.positioning`, `prospects.geography` |
| nurge-qualify | `qualification.framework`, `icp.*`, `personas`, `company.description`, `company.industry` |
| nurge-pipeline | `kpi.*`, `sending.*` |
| nurge-outbound | `product.positioning`, `product.social_proof`, `personas`, `prospects.geography`, `sending.*` |
| nurge-sequence | `personas`, `kpi.*`, `sending.*` |
| nurge-followup | `product.positioning`, `personas` |
| nurge-replies | `product.positioning`, `personas`, `qualification.framework` |
| nurge-book | `personas`, `product.positioning` |
| nurge-prospects | `icp.*`, `personas`, `prospects.geography` |
| nurge-hygiene | `prospects.geography` |
| nurge-sending-health | `sending.domain_type`, `sending.mailbox_count`, `sending.warmup_status`, `kpi.daily_emails` |
| nurge-analytics | `kpi.*` |
| nurge-review | `kpi.*`, `user.name`, `personas` |

---

## CLI Commands by Skill

Which CLI commands each skill calls:

| Skill | CLI Commands |
|---|---|
| nurge-product | `nurge config show` |
| nurge-icp | `nurge config show` |
| nurge-personas | `nurge config show` |
| nurge-research | `nurge emails list --format json` |
| nurge-qualify | `nurge emails list --format json` |
| nurge-pipeline | `nurge emails list`, `nurge emails stats`, `nurge config show` |
| nurge-outbound | `nurge send --to <email> --subject <s> --body <b>` |
| nurge-sequence | `nurge emails list`, `nurge send` |
| nurge-followup | `nurge emails list --format json`, `nurge send` |
| nurge-replies | `nurge emails list --format json`, `nurge send` |
| nurge-book | `nurge send` |
| nurge-prospects | `nurge emails list --format json`, `nurge emails stats` |
| nurge-hygiene | `nurge emails list`, `nurge emails stats` |
| nurge-sending-health | `nurge emails stats`, `dig TXT` |
| nurge-analytics | `nurge emails stats`, `nurge emails list`, `nurge context generate` |
| nurge-review | `nurge emails stats`, `nurge context generate`, `nurge learn list` |

Done. Created `docs/skills/` with 5 documents:

| File | Content |
|------|---------|
| `README.md` | Index and overview of the skills system |
| `how-skills-are-created.md` | End-to-end creation process — both phases, all 4 maturity flows, the generation step |
| `skill-catalog.md` | All 17 skills with purpose, behavior, config, CLI usage, maturity variations, and interaction map |
| `maturity-levels.md` | The 4 levels (zero/experimenting/operating/scaling), detection algorithm, and how each level shapes skills |
| `versioning-and-learning.md` | Learning capture (6 types), version tracking, rollback, staleness detection, session tracking |
| `config-reference.md` | Every config key — what it stores, when it's set, and which skills depend on it |

All plain English, no code snippets, reverse-engineered from the actual source code.
